case_title: CATHERINE SHINE et al VS. JOSEPH S. TALMADGE et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY ROBIN TALMADGE FILED BY DEFENDANT WORLD GYM SHOWPLACE SQUARE

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHINE, CATHERINE SHINE, WILLIAM B.
